# ACR Automobile

> Insurance-approved vehicle security and automotive concierge specialist in London and Surrey, for prestige, performance and luxury vehicles. Services include Meta Trak GPS trackers, Thatcham-approved immobilisers, dash cameras and wireless Apple CarPlay / Android Auto retrofits. Based in Holland Park, West London (W11 4QR); fitted at base or mobile across London, Surrey and the Home Counties.

Contact: 07468 844431 · info@acrautomobile.com · Addison Avenue, Holland Park, London W11 4QR · Mon–Sat 10am–7pm (Sun by request)

## Security services
- [Meta Trak S5 tracker installation](https://www.acrautomobile.com/meta-trak-s5-installation-london.html): Thatcham S5 GPS tracker with ADR driver tags.
- [Meta Trak S5 Deadlock / Cat 2 / E-Tec / Pro](https://www.acrautomobile.com/meta-trak-s5-deadlock-london.html): S5 tracking plus deadlock immobilisation.
- [Meta Trak S7 tracker installation](https://www.acrautomobile.com/meta-trak-s7-installation-london.html): Thatcham S7 self-monitored GPS tracker.
- [Vehicle immobiliser installation](https://www.acrautomobile.com/immobiliser-installation-london.html): Insurance-approved immobilisers.
- [Autowatch Ghost II immobiliser](https://www.acrautomobile.com/autowatch-ghost-immobiliser-london.html): Undetectable CAN-bus anti-theft immobiliser.
- [Tracker & immobiliser packages](https://www.acrautomobile.com/tracker-immobiliser-packages-london.html): Bundled security packages.
- [Dash camera installation](https://www.acrautomobile.com/dash-camera-installation-london.html): Front and rear 4K dash cameras with parking mode.
- [Meta Trak S5 vs S7 comparison](https://www.acrautomobile.com/meta-trak-s5-vs-s7-tracker.html): Which Meta Trak tracker is right for you.

## Apple CarPlay & Android Auto retrofits
- [Apple CarPlay & Android Auto retrofit](https://www.acrautomobile.com/apple-carplay-installation-london.html): Factory-look wireless CarPlay across prestige brands.
- [BMW CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/bmw-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [Mercedes-Benz CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/mercedes-apple-carplay-london.html)

- [Volkswagen CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/volkswagen-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [Porsche CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/porsche-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [Bentley CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/bentley-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [Rolls-Royce CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/rolls-royce-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [McLaren CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/mclaren-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [Aston Martin CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/aston-martin-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [Ferrari CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/ferrari-apple-carplay-london.html)
- [MINI CarPlay](https://www.acrautomobile.com/mini-apple-carplay-london.html)

## Areas served
- [All areas](https://www.acrautomobile.com/areas.html): Kensington, Chelsea, Knightsbridge, Notting Hill, Holland Park, Mayfair, Belgravia, Westminster, St John's Wood, Hampstead, Primrose Hill, Fulham, Barnes, Chiswick, Ealing, Kew, Richmond, Putney, Wimbledon, plus Surrey (Cobham, Esher, Weybridge, Ascot, Virginia Water).
